title: Bajaj Electricals Capital India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Bajaj Electricals Capital India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Bajaj Electricals Capital India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Quality Control Engineer to join our dynamic team in Navi Mumbai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Bajaj Electricals Capital India:
Bajaj Electricals Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bajaj Electricals Capital India!
